materialChanges: Replaced the mastery item that repeated the taught frog-audio case with an unseen museum-entry archive requiring independent predictions from entry counts and an independent clock check; aligned its answer, rubric, retry, mastery description, attribution, and generated reader data.
Made the greenhouse alarm comparison's complete-explanation assumption explicit and acknowledged that multiple triggers would be a sound concern for a real device.
Added a learner-visible route back to the preceding observations-and-questions lesson when the bounded-question prerequisite is not yet usable.
Changed the pressure-sensor mastery prompt to require the fixed calibrated-sensor condition that its rubric scores.
Converted the altered apple result into a commit-first retrieval prompt before revealing its interpretation.
Regenerated site/data/lessons/PREM-SCI-002.json deterministically from the final canonical pack.

reviewDispositions.rationale: The academic note identified a correct evidence boundary rather than a defect. The final assessment preserves that boundary in the novel clock-check case: an agreeing check supports one stated hypothesis over the other without proving causation or eliminating untested alternatives.

The concrete apple opening, natural question–hypothesis–prediction explanation, commitment before reveal, and hypothesis-plus-conditions arrow were preserved because they already passed the recorded cold first-read gate.

The frog-audio case remains taught practice, while the four-point first-attempt item now uses a hidden museum-entry archive and independent clock record. Its prompt, answer, four criteria, and delivery-scan retry require the learner to construct rather than transcribe the discriminating comparison.

The greenhouse task now says that each simplified hypothesis is the complete explanation, adds the corresponding otherwise-silent commitment, and validates the learner who first noticed that multiple mechanisms could operate in a real device.

Scene 1 now directs a learner who cannot identify the observation, comparison, and conditions in the supplied bounded question to complete the preceding lesson, From an observation to a testable question, before continuing.

The pressure-sensor prompt now explicitly tells the learner to state the fixed calibrated-sensor condition, so the requested performance and the criterion-preserve-condition scoring rule agree before the attempt.
The altered equal-time apple result now asks the learner to decide which hypothesis it counts against and supports before the interpretation appears in the following paragraph.

The fading practice sequence, full misconception-repair cycle, text-equivalent frog transfer, reasoning-rich feedback, alternate retries, purposeful scene boundaries, continuity with the prior apple question, and delayed forward links remain intact in the final lesson.

evidenceChecked: All four canonical scenes retain one level-one heading, logical level-two subsections, lesson.json source order, learner prompts before model answers, and a continuous reading path; a targeted browser check confirmed Home/End keyboard scene navigation in that order.

Every learning and assessment operation is available in text through prose, bullets, labelled controls, or semantic tables; the fictional audio record is fully described, and no task depends on color, images, sound, motion, hover, dragging, timing, physical materials, or animal contact.

The assessment remains untimed and retakeable with prompt-aligned rubrics, reasoning-rich feedback, and alternate retry cases; the targeted rendered-route check confirmed a labelled text field and four keyboard-operable self-check criteria for the revised capstone.

The generated PREM-SCI-002 reader route loaded without runtime errors, fit a 390 CSS-pixel reflow viewport without horizontal page overflow, and produced one print-document heading, all four scenes, and all three assessment items.

Every material claim remains mapped to complete source records and a learner-visible same-scene source note; the claims, scope, uncertainty, answer logic, glossary, references, and final prose were checked against each other after the revision.

The public USGS metadata-and-abstract page and EPA causal-assessment page remain reachable and support the bounded question–hypothesis–prediction, candidate-comparison, before-inspection, and evidence-boundary claims used by the lesson.

Both references retain dated checked-no-agent-restriction-found records, public terms routes, exact factual-reference uses, facts-only original-expression rights bases, and explicit exclusions of publisher full text, source wording, examples, figures, tables, frameworks, and datasets.

ATTRIBUTION.md declares CC BY 4.0 lesson content, accountable authorship and material author-agent provenance, original fictional cases including the revised museum logger, and no third-party assets or datasets; finalizer provenance is fully disclosed in this adjudication.

The pack contains no raw HTML, scripts, remote embeds, executable notebooks, TeX, SVG, media, code execution, third-party assets, secrets, identifiable people, real learners, patient information, or personal medical data; all new cases are explicitly fictional.

Strict source preflight passed for both source records, targeted lesson validation passed, npm run verify passed 55 protocol tests and 22 browser tests, and the deterministic build regenerated only the lesson's own PREM-SCI-002 reader artifact.
limitations: No real learner study was available; the review cold read and finalizer re-read are judgments about the lesson design, not evidence that learners achieved mastery.

No manual screen-reader session was run specifically on PREM-SCI-002; semantic source, labelled rendered controls, keyboard navigation, print structure, and automated browser behavior were checked instead.
Non-web PDF, EPUB, DOCX, and JATS exporters are not implemented, so their parity was audited from canonical semantic source and the print path rather than generated exports.

Source access and rights findings are dated policy observations, not platform verification, legal advice, or warranties from source owners; the publisher-hosted USGS article full text was not processed.

The 12 container-only CSP and security-header browser tests are not part of the ordinary local server verifier and were skipped; the final pack itself contains no active, embedded, remote, or third-party asset content.

rationale: The two counted advisory inputs are the unchanged academic approval REV-PREM-SCI-002-ACADEMIC-8412B223 and learning-design change request REV-PREM-SCI-002-LEARNING-DESIGN-01E793C0. Both target original candidate 347c0bca7014b7e70de25019897f5f9f4713502b, use distinct Google and Anthropic run IDs and declared model families, differ from the OpenAI authoring run, disclose the founding-stage shared-operator conflict, and have equivalent non-dismissed COMMENTED GitHub transports 4737162827 and 4737208188 by VSBDev on PR #30. No proposed review was excluded. This recomputes to two eligible inputs, one approval, one change request, one academic and one learning-design role, one accountable principal, two runs, and two model families, satisfying standard-lesson-v3. The finalizer found no academic defect in the original core model or cautious evidence boundary, accepted the learning-design review's material mastery concern, and disposed all seven indexed findings in one coherent revision. Final commit 5c2363225f3ceabcc4296b71a405c0e28f9303b9 contains both review artifacts, the corrected canonical pack, and its deterministic reader artifact but no adjudication file. The final assessment now demands independent construction in an unseen two-record case, its prompts and scoring rules align, the greenhouse and prerequisite assumptions are explicit, and the first-read instructional arc remains clear. The final accessibility-and-rights audit is satisfied within the recorded limitations. Strict source preflight, targeted validation, full repository verification, and a targeted rendered-route keyboard, reflow, assessment, and print check passed. Provenance remains disclosed and attested rather than independently verified. No credible unresolved academic, learning-design, accessibility, rights, privacy, security, assessment, or protocol blocker remains, so merge is the accountable decision.
dissent: The learning-design reviewer judged the original four-point capstone unable to demonstrate independent mastery because it repeated the fully revealed frog-audio case. The finalizer accepts that material criticism and replaces the first attempt with the unseen museum-clock case; no unresolved dissent remains on this issue.
conditions: The accountable operator must preserve this artifact exactly in its GitHub adjudication transport before ready-state provenance validation.

After finalization, the maintainer may change only lesson status and source confidence, retained claims' review-status fields, and their deterministic generated outputs; any teaching-content change makes this adjudication stale.
